title: alaticaulia whiteana
intro: Alaticaulia whiteana, a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, is a type of orchid that belongs to the subfamily Epidendroideae. The medicinal properties of Alaticaulia whiteana lie in its roots, which have been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe coughs, reduce fever, and boost the immune system. Alaticaulia whiteana is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, which can be consumed as a tea or used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
